title: 「Not only... but also...」句型
titleEn: Using Not only... but also... to add a second point

omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Subject + verb / be + not only + A + but also + B

formulas.labelEn: Joining adjectives, nouns or matching forms
formulas.labelZh: 連接形容詞、名詞或其他相同形式
formulas.formula: Subject + verb / be + not only + A + but also + B
Subject + not only + verb phrase A + but also + verb phrase B
Not only + Subject A + but also + Subject B + verb

example: Smoking is harmful not only to smokers but also to people around them.
exampleZh: 吸煙不但對吸煙者有害，也會傷害他們身邊的人。

examples.en: Smoking is harmful not only to smokers but also to people around them.
examples.zh: 吸煙不但對吸煙者有害，也會傷害他們身邊的人。
examples.highlight: not only to smokers but also to people around them

meaning.zh: Not only... but also... 表示兩項事情都是真的，並把第二項事情當作另一個重要補充。

rules.zh: Not only 後面和 but also 後面的內容應保持相同或平行的文法形式。
rules.en: The elements after not only and but also should use matching or parallel grammatical forms.
examples: She enjoys not only reading but also writing.
The job is not only difficult but also stressful.

rules.zh: 連接兩個動作時，兩邊應保持相同結構。
rules.en: When joining two actions, keep the same structure on both sides.
examples: Daniel not only checked the doors but also turned off the lights.

rules.zh: 連接兩個主語時，動詞配合較近的主語。
rules.en: When joining two subjects, the verb agrees with the nearer subject.
examples: Not only the teacher but also the students are ready.
Not only the students but also the teacher is ready.

rules.zh: 連接單字或短語時通常不需要逗號；本練習不包括較進階的句首倒裝。
rules.en: A comma is normally unnecessary when joining words or phrases; this exercise does not cover advanced sentence-initial inversion.
examples: The bag is not only light but also strong.

rules.zh: Both A and B 中性地表示兩者成立；Not only A but also B 通常令第二項資料感覺更重要、額外或值得注意。
rules.en: Both A and B neutrally states that both are true; Not only A but also B often makes the second point feel more important, additional or noteworthy.
examples: Both the course and the textbook are useful.
The course provides not only useful lessons but also practical exercises.

benefits.zh: 先說明第一項事情，再加入另一項重要資料，使內容更加完整。
benefits.en: This structure tells the listener that one point is true and then adds another important point.

benefits.zh: 可以把兩項相關資料合併成一句，不需要連續寫兩個短句。
benefits.en: Instead of writing two separate sentences, you can connect two related facts in one sentence.

benefits.zh: 當人物、物件、計劃或情況有多於一項重要特點時，這個句型能使解釋更有力。
benefits.en: You can use this structure when a person, object, plan or situation has more than one important feature.

benefits.zh: 現成框架能幫助在說話或寫作時加入另一個原因、好處、結果或例子。
benefits.en: The sentence frame helps you add another reason, advantage, result or example without beginning a completely new answer.

benefits.zh: 它提供另一種連接資料的方法，避免不斷重複 and 或 also。
benefits.en: This structure gives you another way to connect ideas, so your sentences do not repeatedly use and or also.

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using not only... but also... without changing its original meaning.
Remember to keep the two connected parts parallel.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 not only... but also... 改寫以下句子，不要改變原意。
注意兩個連接部分必須使用相同或平行的文法形式。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: The soup is hot. It is spicy too.
questions.promptZh: 這碗湯很熱，也很辣。
questions.answer: The soup is not only hot but also spicy.
questions.answerZh: 這碗湯不但很熱，而且很辣。
questions.highlight: The soup is not only hot but also spicy.

questions.prompt: Mia is both kind and patient.
questions.promptZh: 米婭既友善，又有耐性。

questions.highlight: Mia is not only kind but also patient.
